name: [BD] AI Software QA (Next-Gen & AI-Driven Testing) - 6 months Internship

location.address: Etown Building, 364 Cong Hoa Street, Ward 13, Tan Binh District

customField.valueLabel: Bosch Global Software Technologies Company Limited

companyDescription.title: Company Description
companyDescription.text:
The Bosch Group is a leading global supplier of technology and services. Since the beginning of 2013, its operations have been divided into four business sectors: Automotive Technology, Industrial Technology, Consumer Goods, and Energy and Building Technology.

The Bosch Group comprises Robert Bosch GmbH and its roughly 360 subsidiaries and regional companies in some 50 countries. If its sales and service partners are included, then Bosch is represented in roughly 150 countries. This worldwide development, manufacturing, and sales network is the foundation for further growth.

Bosch Global Software Technologies Company Limited (BGSV) is 100% owned subsidiary of Robert Bosch GmbH - one of the world’s leading global suppliers of technology and services, offering end-to-end Engineering, IT, and Business Solutions.

Starting its operation from 2010 at Etown 2 in HCMC, BGSV is the first software development center of Bosch in Southeast Asia. BGSV nowadays have over 4,000 associates, with a global footprint and presence in the US, Europe, and the Asia Pacific region.

With our unique ability to offer end-to-end solutions that connect sensors, software, and services, we enable businesses to move from the traditional to digital or improve businesses by introducing a digital element in their products and processes.

jobDescription.title: Job Description
jobDescription.text:
AI Software QA Intern (Next‑Gen Testing | AI‑Native Platform)

Recommendation Letter for 6-months internship program from your University is a MUST for this job.

 

Global Product Team | Quality Engineering / AI‑Driven Testing

🚀 About the Role — Quality Is the Intelligence Layer

This is not a traditional QA internship.

Our global workflow platform serves 500,000+ users worldwide and is evolving into a fully AI‑native system, built on modern Low‑Code/No‑Code (NCLC) technologies and accelerated by GenAI. In this transformation, Quality Assurance is no longer “the final step”—it becomes the intelligence layer that makes AI‑generated and AI‑assisted software reliable, safe, and trustworthy.

We are actively applying AI to test‑case generation, expanding automated test coverage, and running performance and load testing as part of delivery excellence.

We are looking for an exceptional AI Software QA Intern who wants to build a serious career in Quality Engineering—someone ambitious, disciplined, and passionate about testing, who is excited to work with both engineers and AI systems on complex, real‑world platforms.

You will not just test software.
You will learn how to guide and improve AI‑assisted testing and help shape how quality scales in an AI‑native world.

🎯 What You Will Experience at Bosch Vietnam

As an intern, you will be immersed in a world‑class product environment, where you will:

  • Learn through structured on‑the‑job training and continuous coaching (technical and soft skills)
  • Work in a global, English‑speaking, multicultural team
  • Gain hands‑on exposure to Agile delivery, reviews, and team ceremonies
  • Validate real platform quality outcomes - coverage, reliability, performance - not simulations
  • Have a clear conversion pathway reserved for top‑performing, high‑potential interns

If you are eager to challenge yourself, sharpen your skills every day, and work in a team driven by innovation, excellence, and global collaboration, you will thrive here.

🛠️ What You Will Do (Real Work, Real Ownership)

1. AI‑Assisted Testing & Intelligent Validation

  • Use AI tools to draft test cases and test scenarios
  • Validate AI‑generated outputs with critical thinking and QA rigor
  • Learn how modern QA pipelines work: user stories → test cases → automation
  • Identify gaps, edge cases, and risks in AI‑generated tests and provide structured improvement feedback

2. Manual & Automation Foundations 

  • Learn to develop, maintain, and execute manual test cases and test scripts
  • Document test phases, defects, and bug reports clearly and professionally
  • Execute functional and regression testing across workflow applications and platform features
  • Support quality validation through UAT cycles where applicable
  • Gain exposure to automation growth, coverage metrics, and AI‑assisted testing

3. System Thinking: Workflows, Integrations & Reliability

  • Partner with Product Owners, engineers, and Senior QA engineer to deeply understand workflows and requirements
  • Analyze defects and system behavior across integrated, multi‑system environments
  • Learn quality engineering practices that scale, including a performance and reliability mindset

4. Professional Growth & Team Contribution

  • Participate in meetings, reviews, and daily collaboration with senior team members
  • Improve fast through coaching and feedback
  • Take ownership of tasks and drive them to real closure

🧠 What We’re Looking For (High Bar, Serious QA Career Path)

Must‑Have (Mindset & Fundamentals)

  • Strong foundation in software / IT fundamentals and structured problem solving
  • Genuine passion for testing and quality—QA is your intended career path
  • High attention to detail; disciplined execution; ability to catch subtle logic and workflow issues
  • Professional communication and confidence working in English
  • High learning agility and willingness to take responsibility

Preferred (Strong Advantage)

  • Exposure to test automation, scripting, or frameworks (e.g. Python, JavaScript)
  • Familiarity with Agile, SDLC, or CI/CD concepts
  • Curiosity and enthusiasm for AI / GenAI tools in testing and quality engineering

Internship Eligibility

  • Final‑year or senior student in an IT‑related major
  • Able to work full‑time for approximately 6 months (Monday–Friday)
  • Able to provide an official university recommendation letter

🔥 Culture Fit 

We hire interns who operate like future QA engineers:

  • Take ownership and follow through until closure
  • Professional in communication and deliverables
  • Result‑oriented, high energy, and passionate
  • Strong teamwork spirit
  • Ambitious, action‑oriented, and eager to learn

🌍 What You Will Gain

  • Real‑world experience in modern Quality Engineering (manual, automation, and AI‑assisted testing)
  • Exposure to enterprise‑scale platforms and AI‑native testing approaches
  • Coaching and mentorship from experienced QA engineers, developers, and product leaders
  • A strong foundation for future roles in Quality Engineering, Automation, and AI‑Native Product Engineering

📌 How to Apply 

Please submit:

  1. Your CV
  2. University recommendation / introduction letter
  3. Motivation letter (required) — show your seriousness about QA

In 20–30 lines, answer:

  • Why do you want to build a long‑term career in Software QA / Testing?
  • What testing experience do you already have? (coursework, projects, bug reports, automation, test plans)
  • Show your testing thinking with one concrete example:
    • a test case design
    • a boundary / edge case you identified
    • or how you would test a workflow end‑to‑end

Optional (strong advantage):
Link to a GitHub or portfolio with testing or automation work.

⚡ Final Note

If you want to:

  • Work on real systems used globally
  • Learn how AI is transforming software engineering and testing
  • Build the discipline, rigor, and mindset of top‑tier QA engineers

Then we want to hear from you.

qualifications.title: Qualifications
qualifications.text:
• Senior or final-year students, major in Information Technology.
  • Can provide the recommendation/introduction letter from the universities or professors to apply internship. 
  • Can work full-time in 6 months, from Monday to Friday.
  • Good IT background, critical and logical thinking skills.
  • English language skills (Reading, Writing, Speaking and Listening) are mandatory.
  • Passion for IT software development and testing.
  • Quick learner, willingness to take over responsibilities.

additionalInformation.title: Additional Information
additionalInformation.text:
• Monthly Internship Allowance, plus Meal and Parking support.
  • 1 paid leave day + 1 sick leave day for each internship month.
  • 1 birthday leave day if your birthday falls during the internship period.
  • Accident insurance provided throughout the internship.
  • Opportunity to observe and engage in international projects and innovation.
  • Access to our diverse training programs which surely help strengthen both your personal and professionalism.
  • Participation in various company activities such as football, yoga, badminton, and team building.
